title: agrostis laegaardii
intro: Agrostis laegaardii, also known as Laegaard's bent, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis laegaardii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Agrostis laegaardii can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
